prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "9A. Controls and Procedures" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 9B. Other Information".
Locate the bottom edge of Item 9A's text on the page.
- If the "Item 9B" heading is visible on this page, then Item 9A ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise, Item 9A continues to the bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 9A immediately before it ends. These must be the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Our independent registered public accounting firm, PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP, has audited the effectiveness of our internal control over
financial reporting as of December 31, 2023, as stated in their report which is included herein.

Limitations on the Effectiveness of Controls

Because of inherent limitations, internal control over financial reporting may not prevent or detect misstatements and projections of any
evaluation of effectiveness to future periods are subject to the risk that controls may become inadequate because of changes in conditions, or that the
degree of compliance with the policies or procedures may deteriorate.
